seed_instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program.
org_constraint: Structure the email in three paragraphs: the first paragraph should have exactly 50 words, the second paragraph should have at least 60 words, and the final paragraph should have at least 40 words.
new_constraint: The email must contain at most 120 words.
instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program. Structure the email in three paragraphs: the first paragraph should have exactly 50 words, the second paragraph should have at least 60 words, and the final paragraph should have at least 40 words. The email must contain at most 120 words.
response:
Subject: Internship Completion - Thank You

Dear Professor,

I am writing to express my sincere gratitude for your guidance during my internship. Your mentorship was invaluable throughout this experience. I truly appreciate the time you invested in my professional development. This opportunity has provided me with essential skills that will certainly benefit my future career path in this competitive field.

The practical experience I gained under your supervision was incredibly rewarding and enlightening. I especially enjoyed learning about complex project management and data analysis techniques. These hands-on tasks allowed me to apply theoretical concepts from your lectures to real-world scenarios. I feel much more confident in my abilities now thanks to your constant support and encouragement.

Thank you again for this wonderful opportunity. I hope to stay in touch as I move forward with my studies and career. Please let me know if there is anything I can do to assist with your upcoming research projects or department initiatives.

Best regards,

[Your Name]<turn|>
